question: What is the position of the tank in relation to the people walking in the street? Select from the following options: (A) The people are behind the tank.. (B) Cannot be determined.. (C) The people are walking alongside the tank.. (D) The people are in front of the tank..
gold_answer: The people are walking alongside the tank
